name: CIVISTA BANCSHARES, INC.
summary: PART I General Development of Business CIVISTA BANCSHARES, INC. (CBI or the "Company") was organized under the laws of the State of Ohio on February 19, 1987 and is a registered financial holding company under the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act of 1999, as amended (the GLBA). CBIs office is located at 100 East Water Street, Sandusky, Ohio. CBI and its subsidiaries are sometimes referred to together as the Company. The Company had total consolidated assets of $4,336,453 at December 31, 2025. CIVISTA BANK...
